Hero.title: You'll never forget that birthday
Hero.subtitle: Birty is your friendly app that helps you remember the birthdays of your loved ones.

A.title: Never miss an important birthday again
A.subtitle: Set reminders for the exact day or get notified a few days in advance so you always have time to prepare.

B.title: Simple birthday tracking
B.subtitle: Keep all your friends’ and family’s birthdays organized in one place with an easy and clean interface.

C.title: Friendly email reminders
C.subtitle: Receive gentle email reminders so you can celebrate, send a message, or plan something special on time.
